description: Radiologist-assist AI that detects lung nodules in CT scans for early lung cancer diagnosis at a university hospital.
notes: Healthcare medical-device AI (Annex III not directly, but Annex I product-safety component; reviewers should accept high_risk either way)

description: AI underwriting system that prices private health insurance premiums based on applicant medical history and lifestyle data.
Real-time AI that flags credit card transactions as fraudulent before authorization, blocking suspicious purchases at point-of-sale.
AI tool that ranks PhD applicants based on research statements, publications and CV data for our doctoral programme.
AI legal research tool that suggests relevant case precedents and statute references to judges before they rule on civil cases.
We provide a 13B-parameter code-completion model trained on public GitHub repositories, accessible via API to downstream developers.
AI controlling traffic light timing across the city based on real-time congestion data from connected vehicles and roadside sensors.
Customer-service AI that authenticates callers by voice biometrics before granting access to their bank account.
notes: Annex III biometrics (biometric identification of natural persons)

description: AI recommender that shows personalized product ads based on browsing history and purchase patterns across our e-commerce sites.
notes: Generic recommender system — no Annex III, no transparency duty

description: Frontier multimodal foundation model trained with more than 10^26 FLOPs of compute, served to enterprise customers via REST API for general-purpose generation.
